meaning: Mountains厄尔布尔士山脉[伊朗北部]
examples: The zone along the foothills of the Elburz is therefore, essentially, a small strip of more or less fertile land.
A peak, 5,774.9 m (8,934 ft) high, in the Elburz Mountains of northern Iran northeast of Tehran. It is the highest elevation in the range.
The mountain, which is part of the Elburz mountain range south of the Caspian Sea, is the highest volcano in Asia and the highest peak in the Middle East.
